name: Currant Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add the well-beaten egg yolks and milk, mixing thoroughly.
3. Sift together the flour, baking soda, salt, and cream of tartar into a separate bowl.
4. Stir in the lemon juice, lemon rind, and currants that have been dredged with 2 tablespoons of flour.
5. Gently fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites until just combined.
6. Pour the batter into well-oiled cake pans.
7. Bake in a moderate oven (375°F) for about 40 minutes, or until set and golden brown.
